react.description: One-shot LLM call. Default for data tasks (math, MCQ, QA).

bash.description: Multi-turn ReAct bash loop inside a sandbox.

claude-code.description: Run the Claude Code CLI inside the sandbox.

opencode.description: Run the opencode-ai CLI inside the sandbox.

codex.description: Run the OpenAI Codex CLI inside the sandbox.

qwen-code.description: Run the Qwen Code CLI inside the sandbox.

aider.description: Run Paul Gauthier's aider CLI inside the sandbox.

kimi-cli.description: Run Moonshot's kimi-cli inside the sandbox.

oracle.description: Run the task's reference solution (solution/solve.sh) without an LLM. Smoke-test for verifier + image.

zeroclaw.description: Run the ZeroClaw autonomous-assistant CLI inside the sandbox.
